summary: User identified a workflow gap: research-backed CVSS scoring standards are not yet wired into the active reporting workflow. Upcoming task is for the user to provide new CVSS-focused research to use as the scoring standard going forward.
key_points: Upcoming task: user will provide new CVSS research focused on a scoring standard we should adopt in skills, rules, and reporting.
Current hardwareLockV2 report is valid as conservative evidence-based reporting, but formal CVSS scoring standards are not yet implemented from workspace research.
next_actions: After reset, ingest the user-provided CVSS research and turn it into the active scoring standard.
Wire that standard into reporting workflow, skill rules, and generation paths.
Apply the new scoring standard to hardwareLockV2 if the user wants a rescored and republished report.
